refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and targeted verification for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a digital worksite model/map that includes terrain elevation data, obstacle locations, and delineated work-zone boundaries, validated against ground truth or site survey data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

candidate_dps: DP1: Terrain analysis algorithm using LIDAR and sensor fusion.
DP2: Obstacle detection and classification using computer vision and sensor data.
DP3: Work-zone mapping and geofencing representation using GIS tools.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined as an integrated worksite mapping subsystem.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle analysis.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled through shared sensor inputs but maintain modular analysis functions, supporting manageable coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensor data (LIDAR, cameras).
Risk of sensor data quality affecting mapping accuracy.
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection in mapping algorithms.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit fault detection DP to mitigate safety risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized worksite mapping and analysis subsystem within the overall NGHE solution.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, cameras) for terrain and obstacle analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs processed worksite model/map data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote monitoring and teleoperation systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as mapping is core NGHE functionality; low diffusion risk due to centralized processing.
Low containment; vehicle module focuses on mobility and control, not mapping.
Minimal containment; teleoperation uses mapping data but does not perform analysis.
Some containment for safety-related alerts but mapping logic is outside scope.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Interface latency with Teleoperation and Safety Services if data exchange is not optimized.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are clearly refined and mapped to logically distinct DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized IM assignment.
Potential interface latency noted but manageable.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as appropriate IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification of mapping outputs is feasible via simulation and field validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add fault detection DP and consider its IM assignment in next level.
Define interface performance requirements to mitigate latency risks.

decision.justification: Current level decomposition is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting safety and architectural criteria.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant site features.

revise.why: In next level, add fault detection and robustness DPs to address safety criticality.

assumptions: Centralized processing within NGHE Solution is feasible.
open_risks: Sensor data quality impacting mapping accuracy.
Potential interface latency with Teleoperation and Safety Services.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks for NGHE Solution processing and interfaces.
